verbs.name: connect
verbs.description: Onboard project to vault — rigid 5-step init (breadcrumb, AGENTS.md+CLAUDE.md, vault scaffold, session note, .gitignore). Idempotent.

verbs.name: port
verbs.description: Migrate any legacy project (raw repo, obsidian-bridge legacy, hand-authored) to adjudant compliance. Two-phase: first run writes a preview, second run applies it. Idempotent.

verbs.name: sync
verbs.description: Push project state to vault — refresh brief, mirror handoff, refresh project index.

verbs.name: check
verbs.description: Read-only summary — project state, vault snapshot, schema compliance. Calls check.py for the scan, Claude renders. Never writes.

verbs.name: tidy
verbs.description: Mechanical vault sweep — rebuild _index.md, normalise tags per locked schema, fix wikilink form, bump updated:. Two-phase: tidy.py preview, then tidy.py apply. Idempotent.

verbs.name: ramasse
verbs.description: Deep structural refactor — used sparingly. Leverages superpowers (brainstorming, writing-plans, executing-plans) to draft a content-arrangement plan. Distinct from tidy's mechanical sweep.

verbs.name: dream
verbs.description: Diagnostic crawl — drift report (frontmatter, tags, naming, folders), broken wikilinks, doc/decision mismatches. Calls dream.py for the scan, Claude renders the narrative. Reports only, no auto-fix.

verbs.name: draw
verbs.description: Create visual artefacts — canvas, base, or mermaid diagram.
